text: 2026-07-10 complete: all four backends at 0.1.0 with real metadata, NEWS, URL/BugReports; every check WARNING cleared (API Rd pages, dependency declarations, codoc); backend-checks CI matrix green on ubuntu/macos/windows without native libs (run for 54791d0: 8/8 jobs success) and gate tightened to error-on-warning.
